comments.author: Iso Tester
comments.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "Post-epic remediation (audit follow-on); implementing now.".

compiled_state.description:
## What
The snapshot re-rooting is currently an UNGUARDED CONVENTION: there is no import-linter contract, gate registry, or test that fails CI when a new tool-using agent op reads cfg.repo_path / builds LLMConfig.from_env without going through gate_source. The run_workflow bypass proves the gap.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A CI-enforced guard fails when a new code path runs a tool-using agent (get_runner().run with filesystem_tools) without the gate snapshot process (e.g. an enumerated gate registry the surfaces test + a coverage test assert against, or an import-linter/AST contract on from_env/repo_path use, or a runtime assertion).
- [ ] The guard catches the run_workflow class of bypass (or that path is whitelisted only with an explicit safe mechanism).
- [ ] Documented in docs/repo-snapshot-gates.md: how to add a new agent op so it follows the process.

file_impact.reason: how-to add a new agent op

compiled_state.title: Safeguard: prevent new agentic operations from bypassing the snapshot process
